subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, beyond all mention of the unseen and the seen, befitteth that Self-Subsisting Lord through Whom the world is unified and its bounties bestowed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر غیب و شهود حضرت قیومی را لایق و سزاست که اجماع عالم و انفاق
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
